# Nested Factorization

**Summary**: An iterative method that uses a nested structure to solve linear systems.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[1993-al-towailib|Al-Towailib, 1993]] compared NF as an advanced iterative technique for large reservoir models.
